query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `user_platform_events` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `user_id` int NOT NULL,
  `event_type` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
  `feature_key` varchar(128) NOT NULL,
  `metadata` json,
  `session_id` varchar(64),
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX `idx_upe_user` (`user_id`),
  INDEX `idx_upe_feature` (`feature_key`),
  INDEX `idx_upe_user_feature` (`user_id`, `feature_key`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `user_feature_proficiency` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `user_id` int NOT NULL,
  `feature_key` varchar(128) NOT NULL,
  `feature_label` varchar(256) NOT NULL,
  `category` varchar(64) NOT NULL,
  `total_interactions` int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `total_duration_ms` bigint NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `proficiency_score` float NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `proficiency_level` enum('undiscovered','novice','familiar','proficient','expert') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'undiscovered',
  `first_used_at` timestamp NULL,
  `last_used_at` timestamp NULL,
  `updated_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  UNIQUE INDEX `idx_ufp_user_feature` (`user_id`, `feature_key`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `platform_changelog` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `version` varchar(32) NOT NULL,
  `title` varchar(256) NOT NULL,
  `description` text NOT NULL,
  `feature_keys` json,
  `change_type` enum('new_feature','improvement','fix','removal') NOT NULL,
  `impacted_roles` json,
  `announced_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `user_changelog_awareness` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  `user_id` int NOT NULL,
  `changelog_id` int NOT NULL,
  `informed_via` enum('ai_chat','notification','changelog_page','onboarding') NOT NULL,
  `informed_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX `idx_uca_user` (`user_id`),
  UNIQUE INDEX `idx_uca_user_changelog` (`user_id`, `changelog_id`)
);
